inputs.label: Population Size (N)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of items in the batch or population to inspect.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of items in the batch or population to inspect.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti veya popülasyonda incelenecek toplam öğe sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Artikel in der Charge oder Population, die zu prüfen sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'articles dans le lot ou la population à inspecter.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de artículos en el lote o población a inspeccionar.

inputs.label: Z-Score
inputs.businessContext: Z-score corresponding to desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).

businessContext_i18n.en: Z-score corresponding to desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen güven düzeyine karşılık gelen Z-skoru (ör. %95 güven için 1,96).
businessContext_i18n.de: Z-Wert entsprechend dem gewünschten Konfidenzniveau (z. B. 1,96 für 95 % Konfidenz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score Z correspondant au niveau de confiance souhaité (par exemple, 1,96 pour un intervalle de confiance de 95 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación Z correspondiente al nivel de confianza deseado (ej. 1.96 para 95% de confianza).

inputs.label: Margin of Error (E)
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable margin of error as a percentage (e.g., 5 for ±5%). Note: input as percentage, e.g., 5 means 5%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable margin of error as a percentage (e.g., 5 for ±5%). Note: input as percentage, e.g., 5 means 5%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzde olarak kabul edilebilir hata payı (ör. ±%5 için 5). Not: yüzde olarak girin, örn. 5, %5 anlamına gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Akzeptable Fehlermarge als Prozentsatz (z. B. 5 für ±5%). Hinweis: Eingabe als Prozentwert, z. B. 5 bedeutet 5%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge d'erreur acceptable en pourcentage (par exemple, 5 pour ±5 %). Remarque : saisir en pourcentage, par exemple 5 signifie 5 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de error aceptable como porcentaje (ej. 5 para ±5%). Nota: ingresar como porcentaje, ej. 5 significa 5%.

inputs.label: Estimated Proportion (p)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated proportion of the characteristic in the population. Use 0.5 for maximum variability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated proportion of the characteristic in the population. Use 0.5 for maximum variability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Popülasyondaki karakteristiğin tahmini oranı. Maksimum değişkenlik için 0,5 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Anteil des Merkmals in der Grundgesamtheit. Verwenden Sie 0,5 für maximale Variabilität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Proportion estimée de la caractéristique dans la population. Utilisez 0,5 pour une variabilité maximale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Proporción estimada de la característica en la población. Use 0.5 para máxima variabilidad.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
